description_long: This object is a golden-brown, rectangular pastry with a slightly domed top and a visibly flaky, layered exterior. The surface is uneven and textured, with a glossy sheen that suggests a buttery, baked finish. One end reveals a spiral of laminated dough, with a dark chocolate filling peeking out from the center, characteristic of a pain au chocolat. The sides are more uniform and less detailed, showing the smooth, baked crust. The pastry appears light and airy, with a delicate, crisp outer layer and a soft, tender interior. There are no visible toppings or decorations on the surface.
description: A golden-brown, flaky rectangular pastry with a glossy finish and visible chocolate filling at one end.
description_view_0: The spiral end of the pastry is visible, showing the chocolate filling and distinct laminated layers.
description_view_1: The side view displays a smooth, slightly domed crust with minimal detail and no visible filling.
description_view_2: The opposite spiral end is shown, with the rolled layers prominent but no chocolate visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, with a smooth, golden crust and no filling exposed.
